---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, hook, or improvement to an existing plugin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Plugin

Which plugin does this apply to?

## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the real-world use case or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see (new skill, hook improvement, agent enhancement, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Links to relevant protocol specs, documentation, or examples.
